metadata.assumption: Official diluted-share snapshots are forward-filled until the next official Strategy snapshot date.

sources.name: CoinGecko public treasury holding chart
sources.purpose: Daily Strategy BTC holdings (forward-filled by CoinGecko when empty intervals are included)

sources.name: Strategy shares page
sources.purpose: Official assumed diluted share snapshots used as the per-share denominator

summary.autoSummary: Over the last 30 days, estimated BTC NAV per diluted share fell 2.39%. During the same period, BTC price rose 1.13%, holdings changed by +41,362 BTC, and diluted shares changed by +32,950,000. This means the indicator is driven upward by higher BTC prices and new treasury accumulation, but can be diluted when the share count rises faster than BTC-per-share growth.
